topic: Session management and token control rules implemented

rule_1_daily_session_reset.cron: 50 6 * * * — fires at 6:50am UTC, 5 min before token monitor
rule_1_daily_session_reset.mechanism: openclaw agent --agent devagent --session-id devagent-YYYYMMDD sends a fresh morning message to a new session ID each day, preventing history accumulation beyond 24 hours

rule_2_100k_token_gate.status: DONE — rule added to AGENTS.md for all 5 agents
rule_2_100k_token_gate.note: This is a behavioural rule — the agent reads it on startup and applies it. No code enforcement exists at the OpenClaw level. The agent is instructed to self-apply this gate.

rule_3_context_freshness.status: DONE — rule added to all AGENTS.md files
rule_3_context_freshness.rule: No workspace file auto-loaded into context unless modified in last 24 hours. Older files referenced by path only.
additional_cleanup_rules: improvements_*.md trimmed to last 10 entries monthly
result_v*.json never left in workspace root
